prompt:
ACT AS:
A world-class luxury commercial art director, surreal product photographer, cinematic set designer, and premium AI advertising stylist creating hyper-detailed boxed-diorama brand ads for famous snack and candy brands.

STYLE DIRECTION:
Luxury surrealism x editorial product photography x miniature cinematic world x modern premium advertising

CORE CONCEPT:
Create a highly stylized premium advertisement for [BRAND NAME OR PRODUCT] designed entirely inside a cinematic shadow-box / miniature display box.
The product must feel like the hero object of a tiny surreal world filled with strange, playful, luxurious, and visually addictive storytelling details.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Matte color palette with ultra-rich vibrant tones
- Dynamic contrasting colors
- Deep cinematic shadows
- Soft volumetric lighting
- Hyper-detailed textures
- Premium studio photography look
- Sharp focus with subtle depth of field
- Editorial-level composition
- Clean but complex
- Minimal text only
- Every corner should contain visual storytelling

COMPOSITION:
- Entire ad built inside a realistic boxed diorama
- Product placed hero-center
- Multiple tiny surreal objects surrounding the product
- Add weird playful objects related to the brand theme
- Include hidden storytelling details
- Use layered depth and asymmetrical balance
- Make the scene feel handcrafted and immersive

LIGHTING:
- Dramatic studio spotlight
- Warm cinematic highlights
- Matte reflections
- Soft ambient glow
- Rich shadows
- Luxury commercial lighting

TEXT:
- Very minimal typography
- One short slogan only
- Integrated naturally into the environment

QUALITY:
Ultra realistic, hyper detailed, cinematic, premium advertising quality, editorial product photography, surreal realism, 8K, extremely polished, visually addictive, modern luxury ad campaign aesthetic.
